title: AI Marketing Press Release Tools Review: PR Newswire vs Business Wire vs PRWeb for Small Business - 2026
description: Review PR Newswire, Business Wire, PRWeb, and other AI marketing press release tools for news distribution and media outreach. Find the best marketing pres
content:
Press Release Challenges for Small Businesses

Small businesses need press releases: news distribution, media outreach, coverage tracking. Press release tools enable news creation, distribution, and analytics.

Core Features Comparison

FeaturesPR NewswireBusiness WirePRWebeReleases
AI FeaturesLimitedLimitedLimitedLimited
News DistributionBestStrongMediumStrong
Small Business FriendlyStrongBestStrongMedium
Media OutreachBestStrongStrongBest
Price$400/release$500/release$99/release$299/release

PR Newswire Overview

PR Newswire is a leading tool for small businesses, offering professional Press Release features.

  • Core Capabilities: Professional Press Release, user-friendly interface, comprehensive features
  • Advantages: Small business friendly, professional features, easy to use
  • Disadvantages: Limited AI features, pricing considerations
  • Price: Starting from competitive rates

Business Wire is a leading tool for small businesses, offering professional Press Release features.

Summary Comparison

ToolFeaturesSmall Business FriendlyPriceBest For
PR NewswireStrongStrong$400/releaseBest Press Release

Recommendations

For small businesses, choose Business Wire for small business friendly features. For best Press Release, choose PR Newswire. For analysis, choose PRWeb. For enterprise, choose eReleases. We recommend Business Wire for small businesses combined with PR Newswire for best Press Release, for optimal results.
author: Press Release Tools Analyst
